summary: Bank-grade full regression test completed. All critical ADMIN flows verified 100% working. CUSTOMER flows could not be tested due to no test customer account being available (only admin test credentials provided). All admin features including password change, login activity audit, URL persistence, pagination placement, and dark mode are working correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin flows), N/A (customer flows - no test account)

test_credentials.note: This is an ADMIN account. No CUSTOMER test account available for testing customer flows.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin flows verified. Customer flows (dashboard, balance display, IBAN copy, dark mode account card contrast) NOT tested due to lack of customer test credentials. To test customer flows, create a test customer account.

details: ✅ Login page loads correctly
✅ Admin login redirects to /admin
✅ Dashboard Overview shows: 88 Total Users, 71 Active Users, 1 Pending KYC, 128 Transactions
✅ Total Volume: 35.973.184,32 € (EU format - correct)
✅ Charts for User Growth and Monthly Transactions displayed
✅ All 9 sidebar navigation items present and clickable
✅ Shows 'Showing 50 of 88 users' with default 50 per page
✅ Page 1 of 2 pagination controls (First/Previous/Next/Last)
✅ Tax flags visible (red TAX badges on users)
✅ Filters: All Status, All Roles, All Tax Status, All Notes dropdowns
✅ Clicking user row opens User Details panel
✅ Shows: Name, Email, Status, Email Verified, KYC status
✅ Password section with 'Password (Admin Only)' label and masked password
✅ 'Change' button present for password modification
✅ 'View Login Activity' button present and functional
✅ Admin Notes section with Edit button
✅ Tax Hold Management with CLEAR button
✅ Disable, Delete, Clear Notifications action buttons
✅ All tabs work: SUBMITTED, COMPLETED, REJECTED
✅ Pagination controls ABOVE tabs (confirmed placement)
✅ Shows 'Showing 1-20 of X transfers' with Show:20 per page dropdown
✅ Page X of Y with First/Previous/Next/Last buttons
✅ Search searches across ALL statuses with message: 'Searching across ALL transfers (ignoring tab filter)'
✅ All tabs work: PENDING, FULFILLED, REJECTED
✅ Pagination controls ABOVE tabs
✅ Shows 'Showing X of Y requests' with Show:50 per page default
✅ Search scope dropdown with 'All tabs' as default
✅ View and Delete actions for each request
✅ Page loads (currently empty/no tickets)
✅ Page loads with audit entries
✅ Shows ADMIN LOGIN SUCCESS entries
✅ Login/logout audit logging working
✅ Filter dropdown 'All Events' present
✅ Direct URL /admin?section=ledger&tab=REJECTED redirects to login with returnUrl preserved
✅ After login, correctly navigates back to exact URL
✅ Page refresh preserves URL state (tab, page, search params)
✅ Section changes update URL with section param
✅ Tab changes update URL with tab param
✅ Theme toggle button found (with sun/moon icon)
✅ Clicking toggle applies 'dark' class to HTML element
✅ Dark mode: Dark background (#1f2937 gray-800 style)
✅ Dark mode: White/light text on dark backgrounds - good contrast
✅ Dark mode: Form inputs have dark backgrounds with visible text
✅ Dark mode: Sign In button (red) with white text - good contrast
✅ Sidebar badge system implemented (useBadgeManager)
✅ Badges poll every 25 seconds for real-time updates
✅ Clicking section marks it as seen via API
✅ Badge counts stored in database (persist across logout/login)

customer_flows.reason: No customer test account available - only admin credentials provided
items_not_tested: Balance display in EU format (€ with comma as decimal separator)
Dark mode account card amount contrast (white/high contrast)
